message: Exposed HTTP AddNetworkBindings and GrantHttpGet helpers from the public SafeIR.Transport.Http namespace, kept Internal compatibility forwarders, and updated tests to use the public namespace. Added HttpApiSurfaceTests for public setup helpers. Validation: dotnet test tests/SafeIR.Tests/SafeIR.Tests.csproj --filter FullyQualifiedName~HttpApiSurfaceTests; ./scripts/check-csharp-file-lines.ps1.
